title: KVCOMM — Online Cross-context KV-cache Communication
summary_zh: 首個解決 多 agent 跨 prefix 漂移 的 training-free KV cache 重用框架。將共享文字的 cache 拆為 base + context-dependent offset，透過 anchor pool 內插 offset 並以 RoPE 反旋轉對齊位置。5-agent 下達 7.82× TTFT 加速（430 ms → 55 ms），70%+ 重用率，準確率與 baseline 差距 <2.5%。
summary_en: First training-free KV-cache sharing framework to tackle prefix drift across agents. Decomposes a shared segment's cache into a base rendering plus a context-dependent offset, then interpolates the offset from an online anchor pool with RoPE de-rotation. Up to 7.82× TTFT speedup (430 ms → 55 ms) under a 5-agent setting, 70%+ reuse rate, accuracy within 2.5% of the dense-prefill baseline.
